## Dive deeper with product walk-throughs.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/email.webp)

#### Live Product Tour: Email Deliverability

Discover what makes Iterable the choice of over 1,000 brands in this hassle-free, guided look at optimizing your email marketing performance.  
  
  

**Read more**

Learn how to send timely, personalized native SMS messages at scale to drive powerful and engaging mobile marketing experiences.  
  
  

**Read more**

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/push.webp)

#### Live Product Tour: Mobile Push Messaging

Explore Iterable’s mobile push capabilities and embedded messaging features, and see how to leverage dynamic segmentation to effectively track and engage your target audiences.

## Proven impact: Customer success stories

Hear directly from global B2C leaders driving measurable growth. See how top brands transform strategic intent into documented ROI and performance at scale.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/customer-demo-purple-wave-e1776619510103.png)

#### Hear from Purple Wave: Automated Personal Sales Outreach

Watch how Purple Wave uses zip-code-based triggers and dynamic content to automate an onboarding journey that delivers highly personalized introductions from local territory managers.  

**Read more**

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/customer-demo-lifetime-1.png)

#### Hear from Lifetime: AI-Powered Multi-Channel Journeys in Action

See how Lifetime leverages advanced segmentation and AI within Iterable to create a highly personalized, multi-channel survey experience that maximizes user engagement.  

**Read more**

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/customer-demo-brigit-1.png)

#### Hear from Brigit: Establishing a Universal Holdout Strategy

Learn how Brigit implements a universal holdout group within Iterable to maintain consistent control and test cohorts across all journeys for highly accurate CRM performance measurement.  

**Read more**
